projects_opening_phrase: Each site has its own developer
text_childhood_content:
I always looked at computers as something unusual, and programmers seemed like people who could do anything.
At 15, when I got my first computer, I started learning the basics of development without thinking. My first HTML pages, with bad CSS, my first freelance projects, and a bunch of mistakes. By 17, I felt confident using the internet, making it my career, because...
text_company_content:
By developing everything I've ever had to tackle, I've gained vast experience in layout and server development, and I've studied numerous technologies that sometimes go beyond just systems programming.
Over the course of my career, I've been involved in over 20 projects, three of which I've managed, and I plan to release even more.
After all...
